title: Delicate Roasted Spanish Chwinamul Paella Valenciana
description: A macrobiotic-friendly Spanish dish featuring roasted chwinamul, this paella valenciana is an herbal and snappy twist on the classic recipe, perfect for a cozy dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large paella pan or skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the chwinamul, smoked paprika, sea salt, and black pepper, and cook for 2 minutes
Add the Arborio rice and stir to combine with the chwinamul mixture
Transfer the paella pan to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes
Remove the paella from the oven and stir in the lemon juice
Return the paella to the oven and roast for an additional 5 minutes
